items.candidate: Treat stuck work as an action-design problem before treating it as a character flaw.
items.trigger: Reader is stuck, procrastinating, or interpreting stalled work as personal failure.
items.input: A concrete stuck task plus current friction, fear, and next-action ambiguity.
steps: Separate energy, clarity, fear, environment, and meaning constraints.
Decide which constraint needs redesign first.
items.boundary: This is a reading-derived candidate only; it is not a formal ReaderLab Skill draft.
items.decision_reason: It has trigger, input, steps, output, boundary, and evidence, but remains a candidate.
